'''Comeg''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Around [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], Comeg was [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding]] a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] that was stationed in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], and contained a prototype [[World Devastator]], ''[[Silencer-7]]''.
